summary: Tested advanced filter panel on Customers page. All features working correctly: Filter button visible next to search, popover opens on click, filter conditions can be added/removed, VE/VEYA logic selection works, dropdown selection for select fields (Market, Status, City) works, filters apply correctly and show results, active filter indicator displays, save filter modal opens and saves filters to Filtreler page, saved filters can be loaded.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ TEST 1: Filter button visible next to search bar
✅ TEST 2: Filter popover opens on click
✅ TEST 3: VE/VEYA logic buttons visible and clickable
✅ TEST 4: Field select dropdown works (Firma Adı, Market, Şehir, etc.)
✅ TEST 5: Operator select dropdown works (İçerir, Eşittir, etc.)
✅ TEST 6: 'Koşul Ekle' button adds new filter condition
✅ TEST 7: Remove condition button (X) removes filter condition
✅ TEST 8: Field type change to select field (Market) works
✅ TEST 9: Value dropdown appears for select fields with 17 market options
✅ TEST 10: 'Uygula' button applies filter and shows 'Aktif Filtre' indicator
✅ TEST 11: Filter badge shows count on Filter button when active
✅ TEST 12: 'Temizle' button clears active filters
✅ TEST 13: 'Kaydet' button opens save filter modal
✅ TEST 14: Filter saved successfully with name
✅ TEST 15: 'Kayıtlı Filtreler' section visible in popover
✅ TEST 16: Saved filter can be loaded from popover
✅ TEST 17: Saved filters appear on Filtreler page (İstanbul Müşterileri)
✅ TEST 18: Multiple saved filters visible (Rakip, Test Filter)
✅ TEST 19: VEYA (OR) logic button selection works
✅ TEST 20: OR filter shows correct results (3 customers matching F&B OR İstanbul)
✅ TEST 21: Play button on Filtreler page runs filter and shows results
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Created test filter 'Test Filter 173175' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced filter panel fully functional on Customers page. Features tested: Filter button next to search, popover with VE/VEYA logic, field/operator/value selection, dropdown values for select fields (Market, Status, City, etc.), add/remove conditions, apply/clear filters, save filter modal, load saved filters. Saved filters appear on Filtreler page with play/edit/delete buttons. 3 saved filters exist: İstanbul Müşterileri, Rakip, Test Filter 173175.
